svg.title: Runtime Test Execution Output - Stellar Crowdfunding DApp
svg.desc: High-fidelity terminal capture showing real-time execution of both Soroban smart contract cargo workspace tests and frontend vitest unit tests.
svg.text: Live terminal capture showing 100% test passing parity across all Soroban smart contracts (`--workspace`) & frontend suites
powershell.exe — cargo test --workspace && npm run test — 1440x930

g.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Menlo, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace
